name: Hot Cocoa Powdered Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 lb. package of Nestle Quick chocolate drink mix
(optional) 1 pkg. nonfat powdered milk, yielding 8-10 quarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a very large bowl and store in an airtight container.
2. To serve, heat water on the stove or in a mug in the microwave.
3. Note that the marshmallows may become hard over time, but this is normal and does not affect the taste of the cocoa mix.
4. Generics work fine in this recipe and will save you money compared to commercial brands (about 7 cents per serving vs. 23 cents per serving).
